pi_items.source: setup_task.sh injection logic where P99 is generated with a constant 40ms reaction time
setup_task.sh logic explicitly generates P99 with 40ms reaction time and 0 errors to simulate an automated UI macro
verifier.py strictly expects the report at this path via copy_from_env()

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated PEBL Trail Making Test (TMT) click logs. It is explicitly verified through the setup_task.sh generation script that participant 'P99' is the contaminated artifact, injected to simulate a UI macro with impossibly fast, constant 40ms reaction times and zero errors. The required output file path is verified as /home/ga/pebl/analysis/tmt_report.json according to the evaluation logic in verifier.py.
